settings.advanced.ssd_janitor_enabled_hi: Periodically reclaim stale (incompatible) SSD cache blocks. Restart required.
settings.advanced.ssd_janitor_interval_s: Seconds between janitor sweeps. Restart required.
settings.advanced.ssd_janitor_max_unlink: Maximum stale blocks removed per sweep. Restart required.
suitability.heading: Roster Suitability
suitability.description: Sweep your roster against differentiating benchmarks to see which models lead at math, code, knowledge, reasoning, and safety, then assign roles accordingly.
suitability.config.models_hint: Non-chat models (draft companions, embedders, rerankers, routers) are skipped automatically.
suitability.config.benchmarks_hint: MMLU-Pro and LiveCodeBench are the most differentiating benches on a modern roster — GSM8K and HumanEval tend to saturate.
suitability.config.no_models: Select at least one model and one benchmark to start a sweep.
suitability.progress.label: Sweep Progress
suitability.rankings.empty: No ranked models yet for this axis.
suitability.table.empty: No suitability data yet. Run a sweep to populate this table.
suitability.table.detail.clear_title: Drop all measured scores for this model (after a re-quantize or re-download). Role is kept.
suitability.table.detail.clear_confirm:
Clear all measured suitability scores for this model?

Benchmark records, derived axis scores and the prefill probe are dropped; role and size are kept. Use this after re-quantizing or re-downloading weights under the same model id. The model leaves the rankings until a new sweep measures it.
suitability.table.stale_title: The weights on disk changed after these scores were measured ({records}). Re-bench, or clear the scores to have the idle sweep re-measure.
suitability.table.stale_record_title: Measured against weights that are no longer on disk.
